title: Sculk Hordid
description: A redux of some of the textures in sculk hordes to bring them up to personal par!
body:
A revamp for some of the textures in Sculk Horde!
[https://modrinth.com/mod/sculk-horde](https://modrinth.com/mod/sculk-horde)
Mostly prioritizes the less unique/outdated textures in the mod and updates them to be more interesting, along with some more sculked up entity textures.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IZAfmIELhQI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
